evidence: "Great deal for a classic piece of American animation."
"This was the story that re-introduces Supergirl into the DC mythos."
"This dvd was great. It was as good as the graphic novel it was based on."
"Great stories. I have enjoyed this series as much as I enjoy the Justice League series."
"If you like Superman or Batman movies, you will like this one."
"The art work is as good as the original comic (and graphic novel version)."
"Thank you DC for being true to the source material."
"Great job by DC to bring this to fans of comics and animation."
"Once again DC has come out with a great collection of toons."
"Both are very visual with vivid color and imagery."
"the most beautiful Whale story that brought tears to my eye when I first saw it."
"I hope DC continues to put these shorts in sets like this."

summary: The user has a strong preference for animated superhero content, particularly from DC Comics, and appreciates high production quality. They enjoy fast-paced narratives with emotional resonance, often highlighting vivid visuals and storytelling that stays true to source material.
